products.promise: Karaoke on camera with real in-ear backing, pitch-corrected into your own key, coached by an AI that knows your voice

attributes.quality_bar: real backing audible IN-EAR with vocal clearly on top, latency under ~60ms - not noticeable lag or speaker bleed
attributes.claude_draft: real backing IN HEADPHONES - not metronome or speaker bleed
attributes.notes: Worked example - Singify lesson encoded in the bar

attributes.quality_bar: untrained-ear listener says "wow" on first playback (the share-trigger moment) - not "that sounds better"
attributes.claude_draft: DRAMATIC pitch-corrected output ("I sound amazing") - not subtle
attributes.notes: The "let me do that again and share it" moment

attributes.quality_bar: voice agent initiates the next coaching step proactively - not waits to be asked
attributes.claude_draft: a VOICE agent that talks to you - not text tips

attributes.quality_bar: agent references a specific prior session detail in turn one ("last time your bridge was flat") - not just "welcome back"
attributes.claude_draft: baseline the agent PULLS + references - not read-in by a prompt
attributes.notes: Pull-not-push memory pattern from VMS

attributes.quality_bar: video record + playback in one tab, no extra setup - not external camera app
attributes.claude_draft: in-browser VIDEO capture - not audio-only

attributes.quality_bar: studio dashboard shows per-student improvement curve + share-back to teacher - not just usage stats
attributes.claude_draft: studio/teacher gets branded student-practice surface + visible improvement - not just a referral link
attributes.notes: Distributor feel: "this scales my studio and my brand"

products.promise: White-label AI voice interviewer that runs adaptive conversations and returns structured insight - not raw transcripts
products.distributor: Research & CX firms, recruiters, compliance auditors

attributes.quality_bar: interviewee interrupts/redirects and the agent adapts mid-sentence - not a fixed script that resumes
attributes.claude_draft: a natural, ADAPTIVE voice conversation ("felt like a real conversation") - not a typed survey

attributes.quality_bar: output includes themes + supporting quotes + confidence per theme - not just bullet list of themes
attributes.claude_draft: STRUCTURED extracted signal (themes, confirms/contradicts) - not a raw transcript dump
attributes.notes: The "insights in minutes" promise to distributors

attributes.quality_bar: distributor logo, domain, voice persona configurable end-to-end with zero Connexions branding visible - not "powered by"
attributes.claude_draft: distributor brands it as theirs end-to-end - not "powered by Connexions"
attributes.notes: Distributor pull: "under my brand"

attributes.quality_bar: demonstrated run of 100+ interviews same day with consistent insight schema - not a small-N pilot
attributes.claude_draft: thousands of interviews at consistent quality - not "we will scale soon"
attributes.notes: The scale claim must be demonstrable, not aspirational

products.promise: A patient AI companion that guides you through learning a skill, planning a project, or mastering anything; each Kira is personalised

attributes.quality_bar: agent waits, asks clarifying follow-ups, accepts long pauses - not a fast-turn chat cadence
attributes.claude_draft: a VOICE you talk to that doesn't hurry you - not a chat text box

attributes.quality_bar: session-1 setup is referenced in session-3 turn-1 without prompting - not generic small-talk recall
attributes.claude_draft: opens with prior context, shaped to YOUR goal ("a brilliant friend available anytime") - not blank slate
attributes.notes: Welcome-back recall = memory promise landing

attributes.quality_bar: distributor picks name, persona, scope; their members see "Their Kira", not "Kira by CAIS" - not surface-level skin
attributes.claude_draft: distinct persona per user/distributor ("MY Kira") - not a single shared agent
attributes.notes: Distributor pull: "a personal AI guide for my members, under my brand"

attributes.quality_bar: one continuous thread spans skill + project + mastery for the same user - not three menu options
attributes.claude_draft: same agent handles learning + planning + mastery - not three separate tools

products.promise: White-label AI pitch-rehearsal coach - founders practise the raise out loud, get scored, and improve

attributes.quality_bar: founder speaks for ≥60s uninterrupted, system catches at least 3 specific delivery issues - not "good rehearsal"
attributes.claude_draft: founder delivers the pitch OUT LOUD + gets coached ("walked in ready, not nervous") - not deck feedback
attributes.notes: Out-loud delivery = the promise

attributes.quality_bar: feedback timestamped to the second + names the issue ("0:43 you said 'um' 4 times in 10s") - not paragraph summary
attributes.claude_draft: specific, timestamped delivery feedback + a score - not "be more confident"
attributes.notes: Martin VC feedback: lead with how the coaching works, not outcomes

attributes.quality_bar: system quotes founder's own slide 4 in its critique - not generic pitch advice
attributes.claude_draft: references your actual deck/goal - not generic pitch tips

attributes.quality_bar: accelerator dashboard shows cohort-level Δ score from rehearsal 1 → rehearsal 5 - not founder-by-founder PDFs
attributes.claude_draft: accelerator sees aggregate cohort pitch improvement - not per-founder anecdotes
attributes.notes: Distributor pull: "stronger deal flow, a more valuable program"

attributes.quality_bar: accelerator domain, logo, persona, custom rubrics; founders never see "RaiseReady" - not co-branded header
attributes.claude_draft: accelerator brands it as theirs - not co-branded

products.promise: Voice-led English/language upskilling with gap-scored micro-learning and CEFR certification; employer cohort dashboards

attributes.quality_bar: AI names the specific gap (e.g. "your /θ/ becomes /t/ in word-initial position") - not "work on pronunciation"
attributes.claude_draft: AI hears the specific gap + scores it ("someone finally heard my gap") - not a generic level test
attributes.notes: Prior draft (acting scene partner) was WRONG - corrected per overview

attributes.quality_bar: next exercise drills the named gap specifically + retest closes it - not next-lesson-in-sequence
attributes.claude_draft: practice exercises target the detected gap - not a generic curriculum

attributes.quality_bar: cert is mapped to CEFR descriptors with auditable evidence per descriptor - not a number + a badge
attributes.claude_draft: issues an externally credible CEFR cert - not a self-graded badge
attributes.notes: Certification = the distributor trust signal

attributes.quality_bar: employer sees individual CEFR delta over time + can export proof for compliance - not aggregate score only
attributes.claude_draft: employer sees provable team improvement over time - not anecdotes
attributes.notes: Distributor pull: "I can prove my team's English improvement"

products.promise: AI property-deal assessment - instant Green/Amber/Red on every opportunity

attributes.quality_bar: G/A/R verdict + headline reason renders in <3s p95 on a fresh deal - not a 30-second processing wait
attributes.claude_draft: GREEN/AMBER/RED in seconds per deal ("stop guessing") - not a long report
attributes.notes: The G/A/R is the headline, not the back-end work

attributes.quality_bar: the "why" cites the specific metric thresholds breached/met (yield, comparable, planning risk) - not a paragraph of prose
attributes.claude_draft: clear reason + the numbers behind each verdict - not just a colour
attributes.notes: Trust moment for regulated/professional buyers

attributes.quality_bar: tested live on 5 unrelated deal types (resi, commercial, off-market, dev site, regional) without breaking - not "works on most"
attributes.claude_draft: works on any deal you throw at it - not a curated subset

attributes.quality_bar: agent's client portal shows the agent's curated G/A/R deals - not a link out to dealfindrs.com
attributes.claude_draft: agent shows clients a "steady flow of scored deals" - not "I have a tool you can use"
attributes.notes: Distributor pull: "I look like I have an edge"

products.promise: Multi-channel direct outreach - discover, score, draft, approve, send across LinkedIn + email; compliance-aware, audit-logged

attributes.quality_bar: each contact card shows ≥3 signal-based reasons ("they led the last 2 rounds in your sector at your stage") - not a fit %
attributes.claude_draft: named investors/partners with the "why them" + a fit score - not a generic list

attributes.quality_bar: first sentence of draft names the specific shared signal - not "Hi, I saw your work and..."
attributes.claude_draft: drafted outreach references the specific "why" per contact - not a mail-merge

attributes.quality_bar: send is blocked until human ticks approve + edits visible since last approval - not a "review then send" toast
attributes.claude_draft: human-in-the-loop approval gate - not auto-send
attributes.notes: Consequence-clarity (criterion #31) lives here

attributes.quality_bar: one send action goes out across both channels with channel-appropriate phrasing - not the same copy on both
attributes.claude_draft: one workflow sends across both - not two separate tools

attributes.quality_bar: audit log captures sender, recipient, content hash, approval timestamp, consent basis - not just sent/not-sent
attributes.claude_draft: every send logged with consent/compliance context - not a black-box outreach tool
attributes.notes: Distinguishes from Instantly.ai-class spray

attributes.quality_bar: founder can name 3 reasons they're messaging this person before sending - not "you generated 50 contacts"
attributes.claude_draft: founder feels "researched, not cold guessing" - not a contact dump

products.promise: Discovers, scores, and preps outreach for ideal channel partners from an ICP

attributes.quality_bar: ICP is captured before search runs (no defaults), and unmatched results explain WHY they didn't match - not silent filtering
attributes.claude_draft: scored partners matching your defined ICP - not "SMBs"
attributes.notes: Rule 15 lives at the product level here

attributes.quality_bar: rationale names what the partner brings that you can't deliver today (capability, channel, geography) - not industry/size match
attributes.claude_draft: specific fit rationale per partner ("knew why each partner fit before I reached out") - not just a score

attributes.quality_bar: first paragraph references the specific capability gap - not "We help SaaS companies grow"
attributes.claude_draft: personalised outreach drafted per partner - not generic

attributes.quality_bar: one agency runs ≥10 distinct client ICPs in parallel without cross-contamination - not "supports multiple users"
attributes.claude_draft: agency uses it across multiple clients ("partner discovery at scale") - not a one-off tool
attributes.notes: Distributor pull: "productised BD"

attributes.quality_bar: ICP Discovery + Prioritisation + Partner ICP Derivation are visible stages BEFORE search runs - not search-first
attributes.claude_draft: ICP Discovery + Prioritisation + Partner ICP Derivation stages exist - not partner search only
attributes.notes: Per Dennis memory - planned enhancement; mark when shipped

products.promise: Automates NDIS SDA claims, reconciliation, and property management

attributes.quality_bar: submission-ready claim file generated end-to-end from raw inputs - not a pre-filled form to finish manually
attributes.claude_draft: produces the actual SDA claim ("paperwork that used to terrify me just got done") - not a checklist

attributes.quality_bar: reconciliation flags every payment-vs-claim gap with line-item evidence - not a totals mismatch
attributes.claude_draft: reconciles claims against payments end-to-end - not a partial export

attributes.quality_bar: property record shows participants, claims, compliance state, next-action - not a separate property table
attributes.claude_draft: tracks SDA-eligible properties + their participants - not a separate spreadsheet

attributes.quality_bar: each finding shows the NDIS rule reference + the source record (form, invoice, plan) - not "compliant: yes"

attributes.quality_bar: provider takes on ≥1 new participant without adding admin headcount - measurable, not anecdotal

attributes.quality_bar: click any claim line, see the source artefact (git commit, doc, transcript) - not "evidence file attached"
